overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player character walking through a rural American prairie landscape. The scene features railway tracks running alongside a large body of water, with the player moving from grassy fields through a marshy wetland area in early morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy prairie with scattered trees and small pond

events.description: camera moves from dense tall grass into clearer area approaching the pond

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward a small pond near railway tracks, surveying the landscape

entered.detail: dense green and brown prairie grass swaying in the wind
circular water pool reflecting the cloudy sky, surrounded by mud
rusted steel rails on wooden ties running parallel to the water
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires
hazy blue mountain range on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide prairie grassland with the camera moving through tall vegetation toward a small pond. Railway tracks run along the right side, leading toward distant mountains visible through the morning haze. The environment is serene and empty, with natural diffused lighting creating soft shadows.

events.description: ground surface changes from grass to dirt as camera reaches the railway tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the railroad tracks, parallel to the large lake

entered.detail: expansive body of calm water stretching to the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the railway tracks along the edge of a large lake, with the ground now bare dirt rather than grass. Utility poles line the path, and the water stretches out to the right while distant hills rise on the horizon. The scene maintains the quiet, empty atmosphere of the rural landscape.

events.description: camera turns right and steps off the dirt path into the shallow marsh water

agents.ego_description: leaving the railway path to explore the marshy wetland, walking through shallow water

entered.detail: shallow murky water with muddy bottom and patches of grass
leafless snags and deadwood scattered across the wetland

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera turning away from the railway tracks and entering a marshy wetland area. The ground becomes submerged in shallow water with muddy patches, while dead trees and scrub vegetation dot the landscape. The utility poles recede into the distance as the exploration continues into the watery terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene prairie landscape that gradually transitions from open grasslands into a submerged marshland. It begins by moving through tall vegetation toward a small pond, with railway tracks running along the right side and distant mountains visible through a soft morning haze. As the camera follows the tracks, the grassy terrain shifts to bare dirt along the edge of a large lake, where utility poles line the path against a horizon of rising hills. The scene then turns away from the railway and expands into a marshy wetland, where the ground becomes submerged in shallow water and muddy patches. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the watery terrain, passing dead trees and scrub vegetation as the utility poles recede into the distance.
